## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] CI/CD or infrastructure change
- [ ] Dependency update

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guide (`cargo fmt` + `cargo clippy`)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass (`cargo test`)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` (if applicable)
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new compiler warnings
